plugins.name: pb-hcf
plugins.description: Full custom-workflow integration for HCF v2.0.0+ — 10 enrollable agents across 5 hook points, replaces /proxiblue-skills:workflow-build-feature, multi-playbook wire installer with RO-mount-respecting host-side enrollment, deterministic hook discovery + SessionStart auto-inject, opt-in via /pb-hcf:wire --enable=<name> or --enable-all.
